task_completion.description: Verify the 'ExamAnxiety.csv' dataset is opened in JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP window should display the data spreadsheet, with 'Gender' visible as a column header.

task_completion.description: Verify the Binomial Test module is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left panel of the JASP interface should display the 'Binomial Test' configuration options.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Gender' variable is selected for the Binomial Test.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Binomial Test configuration panel, 'Gender' should be moved to the right-hand 'Variables' box.

task_completion.description: Verify the test proportion value is set to 0.5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Binomial Test configuration panel, the 'Test value' input field should contain '0.5'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Vovk-Sellke Maximum p-ratio and Descriptive plots options are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Checkboxes for 'Vovk-Sellke maximum p-ratio' and 'Descriptive plots' must be checked in the left panel, OR the corresponding Vovk-Sellke column and descriptive plots must be visible in the right-hand results pane.

task_completion.description: Verify the analysis is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the file name 'BinomialTestGender.jasp' in the directory '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/', or the main JASP window title updated to 'BinomialTestGender.jasp'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the JASP GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the JASP application interface being clicked and navigated, rather than terminal commands creating or modifying files.

integrity.description: Ensure the results are generated by JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The right-hand results pane should show properly formatted JASP tables and plots, not text pasted into a document or mocked up.

integrity.description: Ensure the file was saved via the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the JASP 'Save' or 'Export' menu/dialog being used, rather than a terminal `touch` or `cp` command to create the expected output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is located at '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv'. The task requires a Binomial Test on the 'Gender' variable with a test value of 0.5. The options 'Vovk-Sellke Maximum p-ratio' and 'Descriptive plots' must be enabled. The final output must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BinomialTestGender.jasp'.
